package.name: freebotics_rmf_adapter
package.description: RMF Fleet Adapter for Freebotics robots. Translates ROS 2 topics (tf, battery_state, mode_str) into RMF FleetState, and forwards RMF path/mode requests to Nav2 goals. Phase 1 MVP: topic-based FleetState publication. Phase 2+: full rmf_fleet_adapter C++ API integration.
